title: App Access on Mobile Devices
excerpt: We attempted to access Smart Spreadsheet via our mobile Monday app but received an error message. We reached out to Smart Spreadsheet and they advised, “Unfortunately, nothing can be done from our side as for now: monday…

posts.author: KristaBowman (Krista Bowman)
posts.cookedHtml: We attempted to access Smart Spreadsheet via our mobile Monday app but received an error message. We reached out to Smart Spreadsheet and they advised, “Unfortunately, nothing can be done from our side as for now: monday.com doesn’t support 3rd party apps in their mobile version.”. We would love to see the ability to access these apps through the mobile version (phone/tablet).
